seoTitle: How to Download a Video From Canva Easily
metaDescription: Download your finished video project from Canva in the right format so you can share it across social media or marketing channels.
intro: Once your video design is finished in Canva, getting it out as a downloadable file is the final step before you can actually share it. This guide covers navigating to the download option, choosing the right video format, and avoiding common export mistakes. It's useful for beginners and content creators who want a smooth path from design to publish.

steps.heading: Navigate to the download option
steps.body: From your finished video project, find the download or export button in Canva.

steps.heading: Select the right video format
steps.body: Choose a format and quality setting appropriate for where you'll be sharing the video.

steps.heading: Download your video
steps.body: Start the export and wait for Canva to process and deliver the finished file.

steps.heading: Check for common issues
steps.body: Review the downloaded video for quality or formatting problems before publishing it.

faq.question: Why is my Canva video taking a while to download?
faq.answer: Longer videos or higher quality settings take more time to process before the download completes.

faq.question: What video format does Canva export to?
faq.answer: Canva typically exports video as MP4, which is widely supported across social platforms.

faq.question: Can I download a video in different resolutions?
faq.answer: Canva usually offers resolution options at export, letting you pick based on where the video will be used.
